title: cydonia vulgaris var. pyriformis
intro: Cydonia vulgaris var. pyriformis, commonly known as the quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree with fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The quince plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of quince include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and even help with wound healing. Quince is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and jams, and can also be used as a natural dye and in perfumery.
